name: roadmap
description: Keep AI coders on-task while shipping high-quality code — versioned ROADMAP.md + .roadmap/ driven by a deterministic CLI, with quality-first multi-agent review.

interface.shortDescription: Plan, track, and ship roadmap items with quality gates.
interface.longDescription: Turns feature/bug/refactor ideas into tracked, versioned roadmap items and builds them with quality-first multi-agent review. Maintains a versioned ROADMAP.md and a .roadmap/ store via a deterministic Python CLI, and wires Stop (sync + drift-check) and SessionStart (orient) hooks so the discipline holds without manual bookkeeping.
defaultPrompt: Plan this feature into a tracked roadmap item.
Build the next unfinished roadmap item.
Cut a new version of the roadmap.
